description: Provides access to Coresignal job market data, enabling job searches across multiple boards, detailed job analytics, skill-based matching, and hiring trend analysis.

tools.name: search_jobs
tools.description: Executes a keyword-based search across aggregated job board data to retrieve active job postings with filtering capabilities by location and posting date.

keywords.description: Job title keywords, role descriptors, or search terms used to match relevant positions.

location.description: The geographic location to filter results by (city, region, or country).

posted_after.description: Filter for jobs posted on or after this date (YYYY-MM-DD format).

jobs.description: Collection of job postings matching the search criteria.

job_id.description: The unique identifier of the job posting in the Coresignal database.

title.description: The job title or position name.

company.description: The name of the hiring organization.

location.description: The geographic location to filter results by (city, region, or country).

department.description: The business department or division hiring for this role.

seniority.description: The experience level required for the position (e.g., Entry, Mid, Senior).

employment_type.description: The classification of employment (e.g., Full-time, Part-time, Contract).

remote_allowed.description: Indicates whether the position supports remote work arrangements.

posted_date.description: The date when the job was published (ISO 8601 format).

status.description: The current state of the job posting (e.g., Active, Closed, Paused).

total_count.description: The total number of job postings matching the search criteria.

tools.name: get_job_details
tools.description: Retrieves comprehensive enriched data for a specific job posting including salary ranges, skill requirements, company metadata, and recruiter information.

job_id.description: The unique identifier of the job posting in the Coresignal database.
The unique identifier of the job posting in the Coresignal database.

title.description: The job title or position name.

description.description: The full text description of the role responsibilities and requirements.

company.description: The name of the hiring organization.

company_hq.description: The headquarters location of the hiring company.

company_industry.description: The primary industry sector of the hiring organization.

company_size.description: The employee count range of the hiring organization.

location.description: The geographic location to filter results by (city, region, or country).

department.description: The business department or division hiring for this role.

seniority.description: The experience level required for the position (e.g., Entry, Mid, Senior).

management_level.description: The hierarchical level of the role within the organization structure.

is_decision_maker_role.description: Indicates whether the position involves decision-making authority.

salary_min.description: The minimum salary boundary for the position.

salary_max.description: The maximum salary boundary for the position.

salary_currency.description: The three-letter currency code for the salary (e.g., USD, EUR).

salary_type.description: The salary frequency (e.g., Annual, Monthly, Hourly).

employment_type.description: The classification of employment (e.g., Full-time, Part-time, Contract).

remote_allowed.description: Indicates whether the position supports remote work arrangements.

shift_schedule.description: The work schedule classification (e.g., Day shift, Night shift, Flexible).

skills.description: List of technical and soft skills required or mentioned for the role.

posted_date.description: The date when the job was published (ISO 8601 format).

recruiter_name.description: The name of the hiring manager or recruiter associated with the posting.

recruiter_title.description: The professional title of the recruiter or hiring manager.

tools.name: search_by_company
tools.description: Retrieves all job postings for a specific company including organizational metadata and active posting status.

company_name.description: The name of the hiring organization.

active_only.description: Filter to return only currently active job postings when true (default).

company_name.description: The name of the hiring organization.

company_hq.description: The headquarters location of the hiring company.

company_industry.description: The primary industry sector of the hiring organization.

jobs.description: Collection of job postings associated with the specified company.

job_id.description: The unique identifier of the job posting in the Coresignal database.

title.description: The job title or position name.

department.description: The business department or division hiring for this role.

location.description: The geographic location to filter results by (city, region, or country).

posted_date.description: The date when the job was published (ISO 8601 format).

status.description: The current state of the job posting (e.g., Active, Closed, Paused).

tools.name: search_by_skills
tools.description: Performs a semantic skill-based job search to find positions matching specific technical or professional competencies with relevance scoring.

skills.description: List of skill names, technical competencies, or skill identifiers to match against job requirements.

location.description: The geographic location to filter results by (city, region, or country).

jobs.description: Collection of job postings matching the specified skills ranked by relevance.

job_id.description: The unique identifier of the job posting in the Coresignal database.

title.description: The job title or position name.

company.description: The name of the hiring organization.

required_skills.description: Mandatory skills specified in the job requirements.

preferred_skills.description: Nice-to-have skills that enhance candidate qualification.

match_score.description: Relevance score indicating how well the job matches the input skills (0.0 to 1.0).

tools.name: get_hiring_trends
tools.description: Analyzes job market dynamics to provide aggregated hiring statistics, emerging role trends, and top recruiting organizations over a specified time period.

industry.description: The primary industry sector to filter trend analysis (e.g., Technology, Healthcare).

location.description: The geographic location to filter results by (city, region, or country).

time_range.description: The analysis window for trend data (7d, 30d, or 90d).
The analysis window for trend data (7d, 30d, or 90d).

total_postings.description: The cumulative count of all job postings in the specified period.

new_postings.description: The count of jobs newly published within the time range.

top_hiring_companies.description: Organizations ranked by volume of active job openings.

company.description: The name of the hiring organization.

open_positions.description: The count of active job postings for this company.

top_job_titles.description: Most frequently advertised job roles in the specified market.

title.description: The job title or position name.

count.description: The frequency of this job title appearing in postings.
